name: zsh
description: Z shell — common shell across all devices; installed first so plugins below are available

name: zsh-autosuggestions
description: Fish-style history-based suggestions for zsh

name: zsh-syntax-highlighting
description: Real-time syntax highlighting in zsh

name: fastfetch
description: Fast system info display — shown on login shell startup; requires fastfetch PPA (setup.sh adds it)

name: fzf
description: Fuzzy finder — Ctrl+R history search, Ctrl+T file search; key bindings sourced in zshrc

name: ripgrep
description: Fast recursive grep replacement — command: rg

name: bat
description: cat with syntax highlighting and git integration — Ubuntu installs binary as batcat; zshrc aliases bat=batcat

name: fd-find
description: Fast and user-friendly find alternative — Ubuntu installs binary as fdfind; zshrc aliases fd=fdfind

name: eza
description: Modern ls replacement with icons and git status — not in standard Ubuntu repos; setup.sh adds the eza community apt repo

name: gh
description: GitHub CLI — PRs, issues, Actions from the terminal; setup.sh adds the GitHub CLI apt repo

name: git
description: Version control — usually pre-installed on Ubuntu Server

name: git-lfs
description: Git extension for versioning large binary files

name: gnupg
description: GPG — required for commit signing

name: sshpass
description: Non-interactive SSH password authentication — used by SSH_and_GPG/add_remote_host.sh

name: htop
description: Interactive process viewer — colorized alternative to top

name: nvtop
description: GPU process monitor — complements htop with GPU visibility

name: tmux
description: Terminal multiplexer — split panes, persist sessions across SSH disconnects

name: micro
description: Modern terminal text editor with mouse support and familiar keybindings

name: ncdu
description: Interactive disk usage analyzer — essential for managing storage on a file server

name: curl
description: HTTP client — usually pre-installed; required by various install scripts

name: wget
description: HTTP file downloader — used by setup.sh for apt key imports

name: jq
description: JSON processor — required by setup.sh to parse this file

name: samba
description: SMB/CIFS file sharing — exposes network shares to macOS and Windows; requires manual smb.conf configuration after install

name: smartmontools
description: Monitor SSD/HDD health via S.M.A.R.T. data — use: smartctl -a /dev/sdX

name: nmap
description: Network scanner — discover hosts and open ports on the local network

name: net-tools
description: Legacy network utilities — ifconfig, netstat, route

name: ffmpeg
description: Audio/video processing toolkit

name: libimage-exiftool-perl
description: Read and write metadata in photos, videos, and other files — command: exiftool

name: docker-ce
description: Container platform — official Docker Engine for Linux; convenience script installs CE, CLI, compose plugin, and containerd

name: tailscale
description: Zero-config VPN — access the server from anywhere without port forwarding
